landing.hero_subtitle: Ayura AI fuses your unique Ayurvedic constitution with real-time AI to craft adaptive plans across fitness, nutrition, detox, and mindfulness — that evolve with you daily.
landing.how_desc: Three steps from conversation to a living, breathing wellness routine that adapts to who you are today.
landing.how1_desc: Answer a deep constitution quiz and our AI maps your Vata, Pitta, Kapha balance into a living health fingerprint.
landing.how2_desc: Personalised gym, yoga, nutrition, detox, and remedy plans — generated in seconds and recalibrated daily.
landing.how3_desc: Check in on energy, mood, and sleep. Plans evolve automatically so you're always in the right zone.
landing.feat1_title: Wellness plans that understand your body
landing.feat1_desc: Not generic routines — deeply personalised protocols built from Ayurvedic principles and your unique constitution. Your Vata-Pitta-Kapha balance drives every recommendation.
landing.feat2_desc: Gym splits, yoga flows, Ayurvedic meals, panchakarma detox, home remedies, and herbal formulations — all generated by AI, all tailored to you.
landing.feat3_title: Guided by Ayurveda, verified by science
landing.feat3_desc: Every remedy and herbal recommendation passes through a safety layer that screens for contraindications with your medications, allergies, and conditions.
landing.plans_title: Everything your body needs, in one place.
landing.plans_desc: Six interconnected wellness pillars, each AI-generated and Ayurveda-calibrated for your unique constitution.
landing.plan_diet_d: Ayurvedic meal timing with macro precision.
landing.plan_pk_d: Seasonal cleanses calibrated to your prakriti.
landing.plan_med_d: Classical Ayurvedic formulations mapped to you.
landing.t1_quote: The dosha quiz completely transformed how I approach eating. My digestion has never been better — I finally understand WHY certain foods affect me the way they do.
landing.t2_quote: Ayura AI is the first wellness platform that explains the reasoning behind every recommendation. The adaptive plans saved me months of trial and error.
landing.t3_quote: The herb safety screening gave me complete peace of mind. As someone on thyroid medication, knowing every recommendation is screened for interactions is invaluable.
landing.faq1_a: Ayura AI is an AI-powered Ayurvedic wellness platform. It analyses your unique Prakriti (dosha constitution) and builds personalised plans for diet, yoga, Panchakarma, daily routine, and herbal remedies — combining classical Ayurveda with modern AI.
landing.faq2_q: Is Ayura AI free to use?
landing.faq2_a: Yes. You can create an account, take the dosha assessment, and generate personalised wellness plans for free — no credit card required.
landing.faq3_q: What is a dosha or Prakriti?
landing.faq3_a: In Ayurveda your Prakriti is your natural mind-body constitution, made up of three doshas — Vata, Pitta, and Kapha. Ayura AI determines your dominant dosha through a guided assessment and tailors every recommendation to it.
landing.faq4_q: How does Ayura AI personalise my plans?
landing.faq4_a: Ayura AI grounds every plan in a curated Ayurvedic knowledge base and your profile — dosha, age, agni (digestion), season, and any health conditions — then uses AI to turn that into clear, day-by-day guidance for diet, yoga, fitness, detox, and remedies.
landing.faq5_q: Is Ayura AI a substitute for medical advice?
landing.faq5_a: No. Ayura AI provides Ayurvedic wellness guidance for informational and educational purposes only. It does not diagnose, treat, or replace professional medical advice — always consult a qualified practitioner for medical concerns.
landing.faq6_q: Is Ayura AI available in India?
landing.faq6_a: Yes. Ayura AI is built for India and works in any modern web browser on desktop and mobile, with installable progressive web app (PWA) support.
landing.ctabox_desc: Join Ayura AI and experience adaptive health intelligence powered by AI and the timeless science of Ayurveda.
landing.footer_tagline: Redefining wellness through adaptive AI and the timeless science of Ayurveda.
landing.footer_disclaimer: Ayura AI provides wellness guidance for informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
landing.v_today_focus_text: Grounding & warmth — reduce Vata with sesame oil, warm root vegetables, and early sleep.
landing.v_plans_note: ✦ AI-generated · adapted to your prakriti daily
landing.b_dosha_note: Vata leads your constitution — lean into warm, grounding routines to stay balanced.
landing.b_chat_q: What should I eat for Vata balance?
landing.b_chat_a: Warm, grounding foods — try ghee, sesame & root vegetables.
